versions.version_description: Fixed chord names, added performance notes, included slide transition in instrumental 2, strumming pattern included.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
If I die young[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]
Bury me in satin[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]Bm[/ch]
Lay me down on a bed of roses[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
Sink me in the river at dawn[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]                        [ch]Bm[/ch]
Send me away with the words of a love song[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]A7[/ch]
  Oh oh, oh oh[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]
Lord make me a rainbow, I'll shine down on my mother[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]A[/ch]                             [ch]Bm[/ch]
She'll know I'm safe with You when she stands under my colors[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]D[/ch]
Oh and life ain't always what you think it ought to be[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]                         [ch]Bm[/ch]
No, ain't even grey but she buries her baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
The sharp knife of a short life[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]A7[/ch]
Well, I've had just enough time[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
If I die young[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]
Bury me in satin[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]Bm[/ch]
Lay me down on a bed of roses[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch] 
Sink me in the river at dawn[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]                       [ch]Bm[/ch]
Send me away with the words of a love song[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
The sharp knife of a short life[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]A7[/ch]
Well, I've had just enough time[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]                      [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
And I'll be wearing white when I come into Your kingdom[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]Bm[/ch]
I'm as green as the ring on my little cold finger[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
I've never known the loving of a man but it sure felt nice when he was [/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bm[/ch]
holding my hand[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                [ch]D[/ch]
There's a boy here in town says he'll love me forever[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                        [ch]Bm[/ch]
Who would have thought forever could be severed by[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
The sharp knife of a short life[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
Well, I've had just enough time[/tab]

[Instrumental]
[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]
[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]A7[/ch]

[Bridge]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]
So put on your best boys[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]
And I'll wear my pearls[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
What I never did is done[/tab]

[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]
A penny for my thoughts[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]
Oh no, I'll sell 'em for a dollar[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                            [ch]Bm[/ch]
They're worth so much more after I'm a goner[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                            [ch]D[/ch]
And maybe then you'll hear the words I've been singing[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                           [ch]Bm[/ch]
Funny when you're dead how people start listening[/tab]

[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]A7[/ch]

[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
If I die young[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]
Bury me in satin[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]Bm[/ch]
Lay me down on a bed of roses[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
Sink me in the river at dawn[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]                           [ch]Bm[/ch]
Send me away with the words of a love song[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
 Oh oh, the ballad of a dove[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]
         Go in peace and love[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Gather up your tears[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Keep 'em in your pocket[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                               [ch]Bm[/ch]
Save 'em for a time when you're really gonna need 'em[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
Oh oh, the sharp knife of a short life[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]A7[/ch]
Well, I've had just enough time[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]
So put on your best boys[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
  And I'll wear my pearls[/tab]
